title: quercus × incomita
intro: Quercus × incomita is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the Quercus robur and Quercus petraea species, commonly known as English oak and sessile oak, respectively. The bark and leaves of Quercus × incomita are rich in tannins and flavonoids, which exhibit medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Quercus × incomita include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Quercus × incomita can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
